metadata.description: Claude Code and Codex skills for Facebook Pages growth: short punchy Page posts that favor the under-80-character engagement sweet spot, AI-tell humanizer with a bundled pre-publish audit, high-share post hook extraction, comment-reply drafting, and weekly Page content planning. Page posts publish through the Publora API.

plugins.name: facebook-skills
plugins.description: Bundle of 5 Facebook Pages marketing skills for Claude Code and Codex with Facebook-native high-share hook formulas, short punchy and long story Page-post writing, a unified humanizer (rewrite plus `--mode audit` pre-publish check), high-share post hook extraction, comment-reply drafting, and a weekly Page content planner. Page posts ship via Publora.
